Top stories for Raj

-----

Question: Deloitte is giving me 11.5 CTC (consultant) and Infosys (Tech analyst) is giving 11.75 CTC. Which one to go?


Answer from Avinash Singh


Being an ex-infoscion, here are my 2 cents:

1. Consultant in deloitte is equivalent to technology analyst. Infact the designation doesn't matter at all.
2. Salary is most 
Read More: https://www.quora.com/qemail/tc?al_imp=eyJ0eXBlIjogMzMsICJoYXNoIjogIjIxMjczNjczNzAyODk0NzY4MTh8MXwxfDI4NjU1MjU2MiJ9&al_pri=8&aoid=mrsTpCEmcsr&aoty=1&aty=4&cp=1&et=2&id=fb57dc5328af45b0ad28a89dc0b42d8a&uid=jpGRTy0XSZ8
-----


VITEEE 2026 RESULTS
IMPORTANT UPDATE !!
Hello Internet Strangers !
So it's currently 6:48 PM IST (May 8, 2026) when I'm writing this answer. I had written VITEEE (BPCEA) as my back up and they have an...

VIT, MIT And SRMIST conducts their own entrance examination VITEEE, MET and SRMJEEE. These colleges are deemed to be private university and affiliated by UGC so they won’t

Question: Why are IAS officers paid so less?


Answer from Awdhesh Singh


The salaries of IAS and other civil service officers like IPS, IFS, IRS etc. are fairly good nowadays. When you join as an IAS officer your starting salary is around Rs 55 
Read More: https://www.quora.com/qemail/tc?al_imp=eyJ0eXBlIjogMzMsICJoYXNoIjogIjIxMjczNjczNzAyODk0NzY4MTh8NHwxfDIxMjE2OTI2In0%3D&al_pri=8&aoid=I6nMSYWbI68&aoty=1&aty=4&cp=4&et=2&id=fb57dc5328af45b0ad28a89dc0b42d8a&uid=jpGRTy0XSZ8

Question: I have 83 lakh of rupees. I will retire next month. Where should I invest so that I get a minimum of 3 lakhs as a fixed monthly income?


Answer from Michael W Riggs


Retiring with ₹83 lakh and expecting a fixed ₹3 lakh monthly income is unfortunately not realistic through safe investment options alone. As a financial planner, I’d stron 
Read More: https://www.quora.com/qemail/tc?al_imp=eyJ0eXBlIjogMzMsICJoYXNoIjogIjIxMjczNjczNzAyODk0NzY4MTh8NXwxfDE0Nzc3NDM5MDg1NDE1MzMifQ%3D%3D&al_pri=8&aoid=a3ZByp7BDPa&aoty=1&aty=4&cp=5&et=2&id=fb57dc5328af45b0ad28a89dc0b42d8a&uid=jpGRTy0XSZ8

325/390 OBC.
Computer - 18.
Whether I'll get level - 7 posts or level - 6 like OS in Chennai?
I know level 7 is quite not possible because of CPT marks. Gonna challenge 2 ques...
